goal: Compare 3 optimizers for a simple CNN on CIFAR-10: Adam (lr=0.001), SGD with momentum (lr=0.01, momentum=0.9), and AdamW (lr=0.001, weight_decay=0.01). Use 2000 training samples, 10 epochs, 5 seeds (42, 123, 456, 789, 1024). Paired t-test with Holm-Bonferroni correction for 3 pairwise comparisons.
direction: Compare 3 optimizers for a simple CNN on CIFAR-10: Adam (lr=0.001), SGD with momentum (lr=0.01, momentum=0.9), and AdamW (lr=0.001, weight_decay=0.01).
